case_title: PEACOCK JEWELER, INC. VS ROBERTS, ERNIE T.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, ERNIE T. $1,305.74 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,305.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, ERNIE T.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,305.74 FILED BY PEACOCK JEWELER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, ERNIE T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1987 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
